description: cc-agent hooks. Stop: (1) musician-stop.sh — the bounded loop: while a musician is active for this session it re-feeds one cycle per Stop, releasing when the musician self-closes (achieved/declined/blocked), suspends (awaiting), or is cancelled. (2) nonstop-stop.sh — the OPTIONAL between-pieces layer: a no-op unless nonstop is armed (`musicians nonstop on`); when armed and the musician has CLOSED, it blocks the stop and re-launches /musician (open mode) for the next piece — the musician's own brain picks the next roadmap milestone, nonstop only re-invokes it. The two never block on the same Stop (musician blocks on active:true, nonstop on active:false). PreToolUse/PostToolUse: musician-observe.sh — a read-only witness that, while a musician is active for this session, appends one line per tool call to the run's live.log so the work is visible from outside; it never blocks or alters a tool.
